gold_standard.descripcion: Gold standard for evaluating a RAG system on Official Journal of the EU documents in English (regulations, decisions, corrigenda). Contains questions on identification, type search, content search, counting, cross-references, structure, existence, listing, relationships and specific content. All answers computed from data.
